recent_no_license_projects.name: cisco-ai-mcp-scanner

recent_no_license_projects.name: turboloader
recent_no_license_projects.summary: High-performance ML data loading library (10,146 img/s, 12x faster than PyTorch). Features: TBL v2 format with LZ4 compression (45-65% smaller than TAR), 19 SIMD-accelerated transforms (AVX2/NEON), AutoAugment policies, PyTorch/TensorFlow tensor conversion, lock-free concurrent queues, memory-mapped I/O, WebDataset TAR format, professional documentation, and interactive benchmark web app. C++20 implementation with Python bindings.
recent_no_license_projects.author: TurboLoader Contributors

recent_no_license_projects.name: pypomes-messaging
recent_no_license_projects.summary: A collection of Python pomes, penyeach (message handling modules)
